それじゃあ、フェイリンのことは頼んだぞ。<br>できれば、優先して客をつけてやっ:
Take care of Feilin for me. If you can, prioritize her and get her some
clients.
随分と大切にしてるのね、あの子のこと。<br>お気に入りなの？: You really treasure that girl, don't you? Is she your favorite?
色々と事情があってだなぁ……。本当は俺が錬珍術を施してやりたいんだが、<br>緊:
I wanted to perform the Alchemy (Comedic) myself, but an urgent
matter came up requiring me to head to the Abyss. I'm counting on you.
あの錬珍術の本によると、定期的に『精気注魂の法』をおこなわないと<br>キョンシ:
According to that Alchemy (Comedic) book, without regular Spirit
Infusion Technique, a Jiangshi's body can't maintain its moisture.
娼館を利用して錬珍術を施すことはフェイリンからの提案だったのだが、<br>どうも:
Using the brothel for the Alchemy (Comedic) was Feilin's suggestion,
but I wasn't keen on it and had avoided it.
しかし、今回のような緊急事態の時にはそうも言ってられない。<br>問題は、キョン:
But in an emergency like this, I couldn't be picky. Would any
customers request her, a Jiangshi?
なにせフェイリンはキョンシーだからな。指名が付くか俺も自信がない。<br>ルディ:
Feilin is a Jiangshi. I'm not confident she'll get any clients. So Ludia,
use your influence to prioritize her and get her clients.
錬珍術？ キョンシー？<br>なんだかよく分からないけれど、色々と訳アリな女の子:
Alchemy (Comedic)? A Jiangshi? I don't really understand, but she's a
girl with a lot going on, isn't she?
師父……これ、どうですか？<br>……変じゃないでしょうか？: Master... what do you think? ...Doesn't it look strange?
あら、可愛らしい♪<br>よく似合ってるわよ。: Oh my, that's lovely!♪ It suits you perfectly.
へえ……確かによく似合ってるな。: Huh... it really does suit you.
ふふふ、良かった……。<br>師父にも褒めてもらえて。: Fufufu, I'm glad... I'm happy Master praised me too.
その時、フェイリンの姿を見た周囲の客がざわつきだす。:
At that moment, the customers around them began to buzz at the
sight of Feilin.
あんな可愛いコ居たのかよ……: I didn't know there was a girl that cute here...
フフフ♪ どうやら司令官君の心配は杞憂だったみたいね。: Fufufu, it seems your worries were unnecessary, Commander.
こんなに可愛らしくて、色白の綺麗な肌してるんだもの。<br>人気が出るに決まって:
She's so cute with that fair, beautiful skin—it's only natural she'll be
popular, right?
ルディアの言う通りだった。フェイリンの正体を知らない人間からしてみたら、<br>:
Ludia was right. To anyone who didn't know Feilin's true identity, she
just looked like an ordinary cute girl with fair skin.
じゃあ、俺は大穴探索に向かう。後のことは頼んだ。<br>フェイリン、あまり無理は:
Alright, I'm off to explore the Abyss. The rest is up to you. Feilin,
don't overdo it, okay?
はい。師父もお気をつけて！: Yes. Please take care too, Master!
